title: StockGPT - My Experience
author: Beautiful-Town2909
selftext:
I saw a post from ‘StockGPT’ on here and I thought I’d give my thoughts after using them for the last 3 months.

# I AM NOT AFFILIATED IN ANY WAY WITH THEM!!

So I found out about them through their Instagram. I had heard of other software through this sub, but what caught my eye was the ranking/score aspect of StockGPT.

So I paid the £18.99, and off I went.

I started by investing in the top stock in the rankings. **Obviously**. It happened to be $MU, which we all know has seen some insane rallies recently. It’s worth noting that the price DIDN’T move linearly for 3 weeks. 

I think this is because the algorithm they use takes into account fundamental and technical indicators for a medium time frame, so effectively they’re spotting unseen potential. God knows how they quantify things like ‘CEO confidence’, but fair play.

Anyways. $MU is up 191%; I bought in at $369. I mean those returns are incredible, however they make sense … the AI saw that the stock was extremely undervalued and had great fundamentals, and was in a huge, starting to boom sector.

What’s also useful is that they give you stop loss and take profit, which hasn’t actually been hit yet.

They also have a portfolio function. So you put in your goals (time frame, risk) and they give you the stocks to buy. They will then keep giving you updates on the stocks, like whether to buy more, trim down on some or sell others, based on how the score is moving.

I’m aware this is getting rather long and drawn out, but I thought I’d share this with you, as it’s genuinely worth taking a look at. I’m not sure who the devs are, but 9 of the top 10 stocks, since 3 months ago, have increased over 10%. 

If you have any questions about it, please drop them and I’ll get back to you ASAP.

Cheers.

comments.author: OmniShamblesDept
comments.body: Reddit account for four years just to say this.

comments.author: Akhaldanos
comments.body: Obviously you ARE affiliated with them! How on earth otherwise...

replies.author: Beautiful-Town2909
replies.body: I swear to you I’m not!! Thought I’d share on here as I was incredulous at my returns!! I’m no trading expert, far from, so I don’t know how advanced it is, but all I have to go off of is the fact that I’ve made great returns.

replies.author: FrostySquirrel820
replies.body: The word affiliated has multiple meanings.

replies.author: Beautiful-Town2909
replies.body: Affiliated meaning anything other than purchase their product

comments.author: Khalitz
comments.body:
You got any other stocks to verify its success? I'd want at least 10 stocks you took risk on to help determine other stats, like profitability factor.

Also, screenshots.

comments.author: Healthy-Drummer2959
comments.body: A lot of these AI investing tools feel cool at first but consistency is the real test. Some traders seem to move toward platforms like prospero ai because the signals are easier to act on instead of reading giant summaries all day
